choices.name: Referee_declined
choices.choiceText: Referee declined

Flow.description: Added business specific email templates. 30/04/25 Removed the Hard coded Branch logic and added the Sub Flow to make the logic dynamic. 11/6/25

fields.name: certificateApprovalscreen
fields.fieldText:

fields.name: certificateApproval
fields.fieldText:

Is this a suitable referee to request references from for this candidate’s application?
